articles.author: Thomas Floyd, Rick Maese
articles.title: Trump urged FIFA to review Balogun’s suspension before star was cleared for World Cup - The Washington Post
articles.description: The decision by the global soccer governing body ahead of the United States’ round-of-16 match against Belgium was denounced as « incomprehensible » by the sport's European federation.
articles.content: SEATTLE Folarin Balogun, the U.S. mens soccer teams leading scorer at this World Cup, will be available for Mondays much-anticipated showdown against Belgium after FIFA said Sunday that it had suspen… [+30 chars]

articles.title: The European Union Is Splintering—and Some Say That’s the Only Way to Revive It - WSJ
Euclid discovers the most ancient quasars in the universe - Phys.org
articles.description: The European Space Agency's Euclid space telescope has discovered 31 of the most ancient quasars ever found. Two of these giant and dazzling galaxy cores, powered by gargantuan black holes, are the earliest quasars yet observed in cosmic history. They shone w…
